identity_confirmation_sources.label: LGU record fixture
identity_confirmation_sources.use: Exact target named in official record.

lane_packets.summary: Target-specific official or professional clearance evidence was recorded with source URL and caveats.

overall_summary.source_bounded_summary: The parent packet reports only the source-bounded clearance evidence found for the selected lane and does not generalize beyond that record.

unresolved_cross_lane_exceptions.description: The positive evidence applies only to the selected clearance lane and its stated date/scope.
unresolved_cross_lane_exceptions.resolution_route: Do not reuse the record for NSCP, OBO review, or general earthquake-readiness conclusions.
